message:
feat(tui): add spatial focus navigation with overlap-aware neighbor selection

Add FocusManager, focus_memory, and last_content_area fields to
MailAppModel. Implement spatial focus navigation via Ctrl+Arrow keys
with remember_focus_for_screen()/restore_focus_for_screen() for
per-screen focus persistence.

Refactor tui_focus neighbor scoring from simple distance-based to
overlap-aware: uses axis_overlap()/orthogonal_overlap() helpers with
hierarchical tiebreaker tuple (no_overlap_flag, primary_distance,
secondary_distance, overlap_count) to prefer neighbors that share
orthogonal axis extent. Five new tests covering focus graph structure
and overlap-based selection.

Fix frame budget calculation from hardcoded 16ms (60fps) to proper
TICK_INTERVAL (100ms/10fps) to resolve blank-screen rendering bug.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
